differential_diagnoses: Lymphoma (e.g., MALT lymphoma or Diffuse Large B-cell lymphoma)
Metastatic carcinoma (e.g., adenocarcinoma of the lung)
next_steps: Pleural fluid flow cytometry and immunophenotyping
Pleural fluid cytology and cell block analysis
CT of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis with contrast
Pleural biopsy (if fluid analysis is nondiagnostic)
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
PET-CT scan to identify potential biopsy sites
